title: Verify existing implementation of --from <stage> flag
description: The --from flag implementation already exists in the Kody Engine CLI. P3T12 is a two-step verification test: (1) @kody starts the full pipeline, (2) after completion, @kody --from build resumes from the build stage. The test verifies logs show 'Resuming from: build' and that taskify and plan stages are skipped. The pipeline is currently running and the test-suite agent auto-triggers the second step via a nohup monitor (agent.md lines 665-688).
